name: Coffee Anglaise Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, heat milk, coffee syrup, and vanilla bean just to a boil.
2. In a mixing bowl, lightly whisk egg yolks and sugar.
3. Add 1/4 cup of the hot milk mixture to the egg mixture, whisking constantly.
4. Pour the egg mixture back into the saucepan.
5. Stir with a wooden spoon over medium heat until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon. Do not boil the mixture or it will curdle.
6. Remove from heat and cool in an ice bath. Alternatively, pour into a bowl and cool, stirring frequently.
7. To serve, top sponge cake slices with whipped cream and berries. Pour coffee syrup around and over the cake and sprinkle with espresso powder. Garnish with mint sprigs.
Yield: 4 servings
